---
title: "Rosaceae (Rose family)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->


## Planting summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Almond](/trees/species/almond.html) | 3 | — |
| [Apple Evereste](/trees/species/apple-evereste.html) | 0 | — |
| [Bird Cherry](/trees/species/bird-cherry.html) | 5 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Common Hawthorn](/trees/species/common-hawthorn.html) | 0 | — |
| [Crab Apple](/trees/species/crab-apple.html) | 0 | — |
| [Pear Beech Hill](/trees/species/pear-Beech-Hill.html) | 1 | — |
| [Pear Beech Hill](/trees/species/pear-beech-hill.html) | 0 | — |
| [Quince](/trees/species/quince.html) | 1 | — |
| [Sour Cherry](/trees/species/sour-cherry.html) | 0 | — |
| [Sweet Cherry](/trees/species/sweet-cherry.html) | 3 | — |
